blogs.title: x402 v2 Launch: Revolutionizing Agentic Payments with Coinbase, Multi-Chain Support, and 33% Volume Growth
blogs.description: The x402 protocol has launched version 2, marking a significant expansion of its capabilities. This update moves beyond single-request, exact-amount payments to support more dynamic scenarios. Key additions include wallet-based identity verification, automatic API discovery for seamless integration, dynamic recipient addressing for payments, and broader multi-chain compatibility. These features make x402 production-ready for agentic payments, […]

blogs.title: x402 Protocol V2: Expanding AI Payments with Wallet Verification, Multi-Chain Support, and Injective Integration
blogs.description: x402 protocol has released version 2, expanding capabilities to support wallet identity verification, dynamic recipients, CAIP standards for multi-chain and fiat payments, and a modular SDK for custom networks. This upgrade moves beyond single-call exact payments, enabling more flexible internet-native transactions used in AI agent and software ecosystems. blogs.title: x402 v2 Specification Release: Enhanced Modularity, x402scan v2 Launch, and Ronin Integration for Gaming Payments
blogs.description: x402 v2 Specification Release The x402 protocol introduced version 2 of its specification, which includes improved modularity for easier component integration, enhanced extensibility to support future expansions, and a new discovery mechanism that simplifies resource location across networks.
